idea-plugin.name: Prism - IDE Companion for Claude Code and Codex
idea-plugin.description:
Prism is a local visual wrapper that integrates the Claude Code CLI and the OpenAI Codex CLI directly into your JetBrains IDE. It runs each CLI in a real embedded terminal and makes no external API calls — all data stays on your machine.

Requires the Claude Code or Codex CLI installed and authenticated independently.

Features

  • Interactive Terminal — Full ANSI color support via PTY (pty4j + JediTerm)
  • Multi-Agent — Run Claude Code and Codex sessions side by side; pick at session start
  • Agent Changes Panel — Per-interaction diff view with history navigation and one-click revert
  • Context Menu — Explain, Review, Fix, Generate Tests, Refactor from the editor
  • Toolbar — Model (opus/sonnet/haiku), Effort, Cost, Resume, Compact (Claude); shared Templates, Cost, Settings for every agent
  • Prompt Templates — Reusable templates with {selection}, {file}, {language} variables
  • Conversation History — Browse and resume past conversations from the active agent with full-text search
  • Multi-Session — Multiple simultaneous sessions in independent tabs
  • Status Bar Widget — Real-time session state (working/idle/stopped)
  • i18n — English, Portuguese, Spanish

Compatibility

  • IntelliJ IDEA (Community & Ultimate)
  • GoLand, WebStorm, PyCharm, CLion, Rider, RubyMine, and other JetBrains IDEs
  • Requires IDE version 2024.3 or later

Open Source & Contributing

Prism is open source under the Apache License 2.0. Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue or submit a pull request on GitHub.

Disclaimer

Prism is an independent, community-built project — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic, PBC or OpenAI, OpenCo. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are trademarks of Anthropic, PBC. "Codex" is a trademark of OpenAI.

This software is provided as-is, without warranty of any kind. See the LICENSE for details.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.3.0 — Codex Integration

  • New: Multi-agent — start Claude Code or Codex sessions from the same tool window
  • New: CLI picker on the New Session button when more than one agent is installed
  • New: Default agent setting and dedicated Codex executable path
  • New: Codex history — Conversation History reads sessions from ~/.codex/sessions
  • Change: Toolbar items wrapping Claude-only slash commands (/resume, /compact, /clear, /model, /effort) are hidden for Codex sessions
  • Change: User-facing UI strings generalized to refer to "the agent" rather than Claude where appropriate

v1.2.0 — Toolbar & Context Improvements

  • New: Clear button in toolbar — sends /clear with confirmation dialog
  • New: xhigh effort level added between high and max
  • New: Open effort picker option — opens Claude's native interactive slider via /effort
  • New: Open model picker option — opens Claude's native model selector via /model
  • New: Mention in Claude right-click action in Project Explorer — inserts @path for any file or folder
  • Fix: Send Selection shortcut now inserts @reference with trailing space instead of auto-submitting

v1.1.2 — API Compliance

  • Fix: Replaced all internal API usages (ActionToolbarImpl) with public ActionManager API
  • Fix: Replaced deprecated FileChooserDescriptorFactory method
  • Plugin Verifier: 0 problems across IntelliJ 2024.3 — 2026.1

v1.1.1 — Marketplace Prep

  • Fix: Resolved write-unsafe context error on DiffPanel refresh during tab selection
  • Improved plugin description with disclaimer, license info, and contribution links
  • Added dark theme plugin icon (pluginIcon_dark.svg)

v1.1.0 — Compatibility Update

  • Compatibility: Removed upper IDE build limit — now works with IntelliJ 2024.3 and all future versions
  • Fix: Added explicit ActionUpdateThread declaration to all action classes
  • Dependencies: Updated Kotlin, JUnit, Gradle, and IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin to latest stable

v1.0.1

  • Fix: project path escaping for directories with underscores in conversation history
  • Added multi-strategy path resolution with fuzzy fallback

v1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Interactive terminal with Claude Code CLI
  • Claude Changes: per-interaction diff view with revert
  • Context menu actions (Explain, Review, Fix, Generate Tests, Refactor)
  • Conversation history with full-text search
  • Multi-session support with independent tabs
  • Prompt templates with variable substitution
  • Status bar widget with session state
  • i18n: English, Portuguese, Spanish
  • CI/CD via GitHub Actions

action.description: Show diff of changes made by the agent
Send selected text to the active agent session
Insert @file reference in the active agent session
Insert @path reference in the active agent session

group.description: Send code to the agent with a prompt

action.description: Ask the agent to explain this code
Ask the agent to review this code
Ask the agent to fix this code
Ask the agent to write tests for this code
Ask the agent to refactor this code
